name: Sage People
description: Optimize talent management: Sage People's employee assessments offer customizable templates & real-time feedback for ongoing success. Learn more about Sage People

reviews.review_title: Sage People the making people management easier
reviews.review_description: Sage People is ideal to manage people, however it also allows staff the visibility of leave availability, pay slips, KPI's and reviews of performances. Highly recommended.
reviews.review_pros: Simply enjoy the ease with which Sage People allows the application of leave, uploading of expense claims even the scoring of KPI's that gives Manager and employee the visibility of performance score cards. Allowing the integration of Excel spreadsheets to uploaded saves so much time.
reviews.review_cons: The mobile version is a bit tricky to navigate.

reviews.review_title: good platform for basic people management needs
reviews.review_pros: Intuitive interface, ease of navigation within the platform
reviews.review_cons: Lack of bulk processing (e.g. have multiple approvals - need to enter each one individually and approve one by one).

reviews.review_title: A HR system with potential but lacking in easy to use features
reviews.review_pros: Being cloud based it is easy to set up and data migration is fairly straight forward.
reviews.review_cons: Reporting which is based on force.com is very poor, time management is very difficult and the roadmap of new features from Sage is weak.

reviews.review_pros: Working in a highly regulated industry, this solution helped solve so much of our compliance work - and gave us back a ton of time by making things digital - and eliminating so much paperwork and administrative time. from onboarding, to personnel files - - - we can focus on employees with the additional time, rather than administrative processes.
reviews.review_cons: There are a few admin tasks that I would still like to eliminate that Sage does not feature in this solution.

reviews.review_pros: Pleased to work with Sage People HCM, good quality and great services, without doubt one of the best companies in the area of human resources.
reviews.review_cons: I'm really leaving without any complaints, very happy with the result obtained. Excellent 10/10. Nice Work.

reviews.review_title: Sage People for Internal HR processes
reviews.review_description: Sag People is still a great and very useful tool to have in your organisation.
reviews.review_pros: It is very handy when booking leave via Sage people. You have different views available to you which allow you to see the rest of your team's leave on one calendar view. Makes it useful to plan ahead as a team. Sage people allows you to add your personal objectives which are also pretty useful. Especially in the way it collaborates with your manager.
reviews.review_cons: In terms of navigation and UX/UI I think it lacks a little here. It feels a little outdated in design and it surely can be improved.

reviews.review_pros: This generally has the same functions as other cloud software however the user interface seems antique and bland.
reviews.review_cons: This software seems painfully outdated. There are other cloud softwares that blow this one away. I would recommend others before resorting to Sage.

reviews.review_pros: Great, certainly Sage People HCM knows how to relate to your client and how to build a good relationship, do not let them worry about any doubt, solve them with incredible efficiency and speed, one of the best companies in the area of human resources .
reviews.review_cons: I really do not have any complaints to give, on the contrary, I only have very good reviews and very good comments, I'm 100% pleased.

reviews.review_title: A great tool for human capital management
reviews.review_pros: This product works very well for managing human capital for all kinds and sizes of organizations . Easy to use and convenient . 5 stars :)
reviews.review_cons: This covers all the required modules with respect to human capital management requirements. Nothing bad about this.

reviews.author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: This software looks very elegant on the outside. And is easy to learn and to pick up. Very useful tool
reviews.review_cons: The pricing is a little bit on the higher side for the same class of softwares, which makes it non-competitive.

reviews.review_description: Fairsail is simple to learn and easy to use and configure. It is powerful - includes all the core functionality most people will ever need across the entire employee lifecycle. Integrates really well with existing / other systems. Can be implemented rapidly. Sits on the salesforce platform which is very robust. The staff at Fairsail are fantastic to work with and offer outstanding service. The system is priced very reasonably, especially compared to bigger names in the market. Cannot recommend highly enough - by far and away the best HR software I have ever used!

reviews.review_title: We're just starting out, but so far, so good
reviews.review_pros: It seems very intuitive and like it can support all we are trying to do.
reviews.review_cons: It hasn't been an issue yet, but I am concerned about their service model.

reviews.review_title: Overly Complex HR System With a Difficult Learning Curve
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall, Sage People felt like more of an administrative burden than a solution. Despite its extensive capabilities, everyday use is clunky and demanding. The time spent training, troubleshooting, and managing the system outweighs the benefits. For modern HR teams, there are far more user-friendly systems that accomplish the same goals without the frustration.
reviews.review_pros: Sage People has extensive functionality and strong potential for organizations that need deep HR tracking, reporting, and global compliance. Once everything is configured properly, it can handle complex HR workflows and large-scale workforce needs.
reviews.review_cons: The system is extremely difficult to learn, navigate, and customize. Even simple updates require multiple clicks and often feel buried in menus. Configuration is so technical that you almost need an in-house Sage expert to make ongoing changes. The interface is dated, slow, and unintuitive, and employees frequently struggle with basic tasks like requesting PTO or updating their information. Instead of supporting HR, it often slows processes down.

reviews.review_description: Overall was a great experience and was in the system daily being the leader of HR. I ran reports, worked on analytics and other strategies surrounding staffing
reviews.review_pros: It was easy to use for all modules that I worked in surrounding the HCM platform. Our company did leave Sage but please know that it wasn't b/c we wanted it to happen. We did not like Oracle and it was so broken.
reviews.review_cons: That we could not keep the platform. It worked well with our site and our production teams. I was very impressed by the customer service along with the ability to use the system with ease.

reviews.review_description: I have a great experience as it was easy to learn and the customer support was top notch whenever I experienced bugs and issues
reviews.review_pros: I got value for money as it captured all my employees information, and it was easy to use and navigate different modules
reviews.review_cons: Payroll, we could not use sage for payroll directly, we had to try manual process to get through the payroll process

reviews.review_title: Sage People - Good Option For HR Management
reviews.review_description: In short, Sage People is a good, scalable HR and talent management solution for mid-to-large size companies, especially those operating globally. It provides flexible workflows, solid analytics and integrated payroll capabilities with strong customer support. However, it may not be the right match for organizations needing advanced performance modules and highly intuitive UX.
reviews.review_pros: It is very user-friendly and easy to adapt. It's customizable reports and workflows help simplify core HR functions like leave requests, performance reviews and recruitment. To the best of my knowledge, we haven't face any bug issue. Advanced features like pulse surveys, analytics for wellness and insights into employee energy levels help managers proactively detect burnout or disengagement. Excellent value for money and customer support is also really good.
reviews.review_cons: Initial customization might seem a bit difficult, however once you start using it regularly, it would be much easier. There are limited options for formatting data and at times there are small issues with navigation.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I have always like sage products especially for legal aspect tracking and when this was developed I loved how it linked with our other platforms.
reviews.review_pros: Employee Mngmt and Payroll features, it added ease to my payroll process by tracking all past events
reviews.review_cons: DOnt have any yet im still experiencing it and the features in full mode and hoopefully i get more pros then cons

reviews.review_title: Solid solution, but could be improved
reviews.review_pros: It’s an all-in-one solution that covers everything from payroll to performance reviews, and it does make managing people a lot simpler. The dashboard is user-friendly, and the reporting features are pretty solid
reviews.review_cons: I find the system can be a bit clunky at times. The integration with other software is not always as smooth as I’d like, which can create some friction when syncing data.

reviews.review_description: very positive, do use regularly for payroll.
reviews.review_pros: easy to use, good menus and easy options
reviews.review_cons: extra security, do wish you could edit options

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: My overall experience is that i dont like the application as it has too many bugs and issues which in turn slows things down
reviews.review_pros: I like the ease of use and the value for my money. The pay roll is great too. When i use customer support they are very helpful
reviews.review_cons: I dont like the bugs and issues thay are presented. It makes it hard ti sue this application and navigate it

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall I think this software helped us acheive a more effiencient routine for our financial reports being able to create different reports for different data was unique. I would recommend for small to medium businesses.
reviews.review_pros: This software was suitable for our team as we only have about 25-50 users. We felt this software was user friendly. It helped us to improve our client relations and streamline our internal processes.
reviews.review_cons: Not many cons. Price is a factor if we grow our team to more users then this may not be in our budget. Faced some software glitches during peak business hours, reports taking longer to download/send etc. Integration of this software was typically, some learning curves the first 2 weeks but were ironed out with supports help.

reviews.review_description: I like sage mainly because of how easy it is to toggle through the app and manage payslips
reviews.review_pros: The interface is awesome. Very easy to understand
reviews.review_cons: the document storage is not a big deal on sage

reviews.review_description: Overall i had a great experience with Sage
reviews.review_pros: The customer help was a good experience when we had user access issues on Sage
reviews.review_cons: The Application can make payroll easier and more functional for paying a lot of staff.

reviews.review_title: A Flexible HR Solution with a Learning Curve
reviews.review_description: delivers a strong, comprehensive HR management system, with a focus on automation and customization.
reviews.review_pros: flexibility and ability to streamline HR processes
reviews.review_cons: complexity in customization. reporting functionalities could be more intuitive, as extracting certain workforce insights isn't always straightforward.

reviews.review_description: I can say it’s a win win situation for small to medium enterprises
reviews.review_pros: I have tried different product of sage Most easy to setup and use software so far.
reviews.review_cons: Integration between other software is not easy age has other products that can be more satisfying
